final:
// // This module implements a D flip-flop with negative-edge triggering and updates on disable
module d_ff_en_ce (
    input clk,
    input en,
    input enclk,
    input d,
    output reg q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (en && enclk) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a D flip-flop with negative-edge triggering and updates on disable
